title: Senior Plant Manager at Charak Pharma

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Charak Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!
